actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The bear makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) Slashing damage.

tactical_info.positioning: Uses amphibious nature for surprise attacks from water
tactical_info.key_abilities: Cold resistance, excellent swim speed, high perception
tactical_info.weaknesses: Standard bear vulnerabilities, no special defenses
tactical_info.synergies: Perfect for arctic environments and cold-weather encounters
